chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3602 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "اِحْذَرُوا مُعَامَلَةَ أَصْحَابِ اَلْعَاهَاتِ فَإِنَّهُمْ أَظْلَمُ شَيْءٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3602 - Imam (as) said: "Beware of dealing with those who have defects, for they are the most unjust of people."
